name: Big Telly Jam with Biome Collective and Arcadia
short_description: One-day collaborative workshop for artists, game designers and creative technologists exploring creative technology, digital art and immersive experiences.
description: Biome Collective and Arcadia are hosting Big Telly Jam on Wed 6 May — a one-day collaborative workshop designed for artists, game designers and creative technologists to explore creative technology, digital art and immersive experiences.
